title: Resteel
description:
this mod adds Steel to Minecraft that is mainly Designed to protect your items from other people

Also has Electric Fences and other funny stuff
body:
This Mod adds the Following..


Main:

Steel Block

Steel Staircase

Steel Wall

Steel TrapDoor

Steel Door

Steel Ore

Reinforced Light

Reinforced Glass Block

Barbed Wire

Padding

Fan Block

TRUE Concrete (supposed to be as strong as concrete)

Pulsar Cannon (own ammo)

STAR Item (can be used as Ammo or as Furnace Fuel)

A new Music Disc (new Trade!)

A Couple new Structures.

Radiation Effect

Quantum Box (holds more items than a double Chest)






MISC:

Electric Fence

Keypad

Nuclear Waste Block

Nuclear Waste Barrel

Missing Texture Block

Fnaf Stuff

Backrooms Stuff

Metal Pipe

Tactical Nuke (item)

Burger

Sprite

Diet Coke

Doritos





Now why would you want to download this mod?

Ever wanted to use Iron Blocks to make a Bunker for items? but then you Realise Iron Blocks are just too easy to Break? well Steel is the Solution! the Blocks will take a LOT Longer to mine Making the Items Harded to Steal!



And the Pulsar Cannon be used as a Deadly Weapon for War! Be careful when using it! you only have 50 uses so make Every Shot Count!



(MULTIPLAYER USED AS EXAMPLE)
